headline: Trinity's TGaS Advisors Announces Winners of 9th Annual Best of Benchmark Awards
summary: Trinity, a leader in strategy, insights and analytics for the life sciences industry, announced the winners of the TGaS Advisors Best of Benchmark (BoBs) Awards. The awards, presented annually, recognize operational excellence across pharmaceutical organizations based on TGaS benchmarking data.

raw.headline: Trinity's TGaS Advisors Announces Winners of 9th Annual Best of Benchmark Awards

headline: GILD Q1 Deep Dive: HIV Growth, Oncology Pipeline, and Margin Management Shape 2026 Outlook
summary: Biopharmaceutical company Gilead Sciences (NASDAQ:GILD) reported revenue ahead of Wall Street’s expectations in Q1 CY2026, with sales up 4.4% year on year to $6.96 billion. The company expects the full year’s revenue to be around $30.2 billion, close to analysts’ estimates. Its non-GAAP profit of $2.03 per share was 6.3% above analysts’ consensus estimates.
